name: Laporan KP - Generic Indonesian
description: Generic Indonesian Kerja Praktik (KP) report skeleton with cover, lembar pengesahan, kata pengantar, daftar isi, BAB I, BAB II, log book table, lampiran, and daftar pustaka. Suitable as a starting point for any Indonesian university - replace constants with your institution's specifics.

latar_belakang.default: Latar belakang penelitian akan ditulis di sini.

tujuan.default: Tujuan utama dari kerja praktik ini adalah...

notes: Log book table is shipped with a single header row. After rendering, add log entries by appending rows in Word, or use the structured tools (`struct_set` with `table:N!row:M`) to programmatically insert them.
